headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on Analog Devices, Raises Price Target to $498
summary: Stifel  analyst Tore Svanberg   maintains Analog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) with a Buy and raises the price target from $450 to $498.

raw.headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on Analog Devices, Raises Price Target to $498
raw.summary: Stifel  analyst Tore Svanberg   maintains Analog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) with a Buy and raises the price target from $450 to $498.

headline: 2 Unpopular Stocks That Deserve a Second Chance and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: When Wall Street turns bearish on a stock, it’s worth paying attention. These calls stand out because analysts rarely issue grim ratings on companies for fear their firms will lose out in other business lines such as M&A advisory.
